sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import "./AwesomeFacts.css"; function AwesomeFacts() { return (

Awesome Facts

Gypsona is one of the leading fly ash bricks manufacturers in Delhi-NCR. Fly Ash is a waste generated from Thermal Power Plants. Fal G is a technological renaissance of the age-old pozzolanic industry proven for its strength and durability. Fal G is a ground blend of Fly Ash (Fa), Lime (L), and Gypsum (G) in suitable proportions which, upon hydration, yields strength in the range of 40 to 400 Kg/Sqcm, rendering a totally water-impervious hard matrix with the formation of mineralogical phases during hydration similar to those of ordinary Portland cement (OPC). Kalesh Build Solutions is committed to providing the best quality and reliable building products to achieve the highest level of customer satisfaction in the industry. As a client-centric organization, we build strong relationships with our clients through our unwavering commitment to quality. To provide superior products, we maintain strict quality checks from the procurement of raw materials to the finished products as per customer specifications.

); } export default AwesomeFacts;
